title: Lentil and Sali Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with lentils, sali, and puy, perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat the i in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the puy and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sali and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the lentils and stew. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
